basic_details.job_title: SAIL BSL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Steel Authority of India Limited (SAIL) – Bokaro Steel Plant (BSL), Bokaro-827001, Jharkhand
basic_details.short_information: SAIL Bokaro Steel Plant is recruiting Young Professionals across three levels with B.E./B.Tech (minimum 65% marks) and 3 to 10 years of post-qualification experience, last date 01 July 2026.

application_fee.details: Payment is through Bill Desk Payment Gateway (online mode only). Any additional bank charges are to be borne by the candidate. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Failed transaction amounts will be automatically refunded to the originating account.

age_limit.age_details: Fixed Term (Contract for Service) – NOT Regular/Permanent Employment
age_limit.details: Note: The advertisement does not specify age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD. Candidates should check the official notification for any such provisions.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | minimum age: 23 years (as on closing date of application) | application restriction: A candidate may apply for only one level and one domain/role. Fulfillment of eligibility criteria alone does not confer any right to selection. | government/psu employees: Must produce NOC from present employer at time of Interview and release order at time of joining
qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech (Regular/Full-time) in the relevant discipline from Govt. recognised University/Institution with minimum 65% marks. For Finance Consultant (YP-1): CA/CS/CMA. Distance/Correspondence mode NOT eligible.

Material Handling and Operations/Maintenance/Repair of Tippler/Reclaimer/Stacker in a Manufacturing industry or Mines
vacancy_details.Desirable Qualification / Experience: Knowledge of Railway rake handling, wagon logistics and inventory management; Understanding of Raw material flow in Steel Plant (Iron Ore, Coal, Limestone, Dolomite etc.)

vacancy_details.Essential Experience (Post Qualification: Vibration Management, Rotatory Equipment, Mechanical Design & Engineering and AutoCAD Hydraulics/Mechatronics in relevant discipline

Cold Rolling Mill Operation
Structural Design using AutoCAD/STAAD.Pro etc.
Development/Maintenance/Repair of PLC, Drives, Automation in relevant discipline
Supply Chain Management / Stores / Material Management / Purchase
Land Survey – Cadastral Survey, Topographical Survey, preparation of maps in GIS
vacancy_details.Desirable Qualification / Experience: Diploma in Survey; 5 years' experience in Land Survey (Cadastral, Topographical, GIS)

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: CA (Chartered Accountant) or CS (Company Secretary) or CMA (Cost & Management Accountant)
vacancy_details.Essential Experience (Post Qualification: ERP Systems: Advanced proficiency in SAP – FICO module; Corporate Finance / Auditing / Accounting
vacancy_details.Desirable Qualification / Experience: Expert-level Advanced Excel skills (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, Complex formulas)

vacancy_details.Essential Experience (Post Qualification: Project Management in Iron and Steel Industry in relevant discipline

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science or equivalent
vacancy_details.Essential Experience (Post Qualification: Predictive analytics, workforce planning, or process automation; Prior experience in large-scale HR data integration projects
vacancy_details.Desirable Qualification / Experience: Master's degree in HRM; Certification in HR Analytics

vacancy_details.Essential Experience (Post Qualification: Blast Furnace Operations of an Integrated Steel Plant

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Electrical / Electronics / Computer Science / Instrumentation / Electronics or equivalent
vacancy_details.Essential Experience (Post Qualification: At least 6 years in Programming / Web development / App development / Dashboard design of live production data

selection_process: Selection will be based on the following stages:
Stage 1 – Scrutiny and Shortlisting: Applications received by closing date will be scrutinized and candidates shortlisted based on eligibility criteria.
Stage 2 – Computer Based Test (CBT) (if applicable): If eligible applications exceed 5 times the requirement

SAIL-BSL may conduct a CBT/Aptitude/General Management/Psychometric Test through an external agency. Minimum qualifying marks: 50 percentile score. Shortlisting for interview will be in a 1:3 ratio on the basis of CBT performance. If fewer than 5 times applications are received
all eligible candidates may be called directly for interview.
Stage 3 – Personal Interaction / Interview: Shortlisted candidates will appear for an interview (physical or virtual mode) assessing relevance and quality of work experience

and published articles/books/papers. Minimum qualifying marks for interview (if no CBT): 50%. Final merit list is prepared with CBT:Interview weightage of 80:20. Tie-breaking: higher CBT marks → higher eligibility qualification marks.

Travel Reimbursement for Interview: Candidates invited in-person for interview will be reimbursed single to-and-fro 2AC train fare (shortest route) from normal place of correspondence to interview venue
subject to rail/road distance exceeding 30 km each way
Joining: Selected candidates will be given a maximum of 30 days to report
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the SAIL Careers website (https://sailcareers.com/). No other means/mode of application will be accepted. Candidates should ensure they fulfill all eligibility criteria before applying, as admission at all stages is purely provisional.
Log on to https://sailcareers.com/ and navigate to the Jobs section.
Click on the link for "Engagement of Young Professionals in Bokaro Steel Plant."
Click on the "Fresh Candidate – Create Log In" link and register.
Fill in all required personal, educational, and experience details accurately.
Upload Photograph: Recent passport-size colour photo against light/white background, both ears visible, no caps/dark glasses. File format: .jpg/.jpeg, size not more than 50 KB.
Upload Signature: Sign on white paper with black ink pen, scan signature area only. File format: .jpg/.jpeg, size not more than 20 KB. This signature will appear on the Admit Card.

Upload Documents (PDF, less than 300 KB each): Matriculation Certificate (proof of DOB); Marks Sheet and Degree Certificate of B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech/CA/CS/CMA/MBA as applicable; Experience Certificates clearly mentioning job profile and area; Appointment Offers/Promotion Orders/Release Orders/Last Pay Slip from the company.
Review all entered details carefully and click Submit. Information cannot be edited after submission.
Make registration fee payment of Rs. 500/- through Bill Desk Payment Gateway (online mode only).
After payment, submit the application and note down the Application Number for all future correspondence.
Take a printout of the application form for records; it may be required during the recruitment process.

Candidature is liable to be rejected at any stage if information is found false or not conforming to eligibility criteria. Incomplete applications or applications without registration fee will be rejected summarily. All corrigendum/updates will be published on sailcareers.com only.
important_instructions: This engagement is purely on a fixed-term "Contract for Service" basis. It does NOT create any right to regularization, permanent employment, or comparison with regular SAIL employees. A candidate shall apply for only one level and one domain/role. Applications for multiple levels/domains will be rejected. Essential B.E./B.Tech qualification must be Regular/Full-time with minimum 65% marks. Distance/Correspondence/Off-campus qualifications are not eligible. All relevant experience must be from a registered Company. Sufficient documentary evidence (experience certificates, appointment orders, pay slips) must be uploaded and produced at interview. Candidates employed in Govt. Departments/PSUs/Autonomous Bodies must produce NOC at time of Interview and release order at time of joining. The contract can be terminated by SAIL-BSL with 7 days' notice within the first 6 months; thereafter with 1 month's notice or equivalent retainership fee. Continued absence of 15 days without sanction leads to immediate termination. SAIL may utilize the YP's services at any of its Plants/Units/Subsidiaries/JVs subject to the YP's express consent. All payments are subject to applicable Income Tax/GST deductions. No PRP, PF, pension, gratuity, or loans/advances are payable. Candidates must have a valid personal email ID and working mobile number active throughout the entire selection process; all communications will be via email/SMS only. Registration fee of Rs. 500/- once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances (failed transactions will be auto-refunded to the originating account). Information entered in the online application cannot be changed at any stage after submission. Bringing outside influence at any stage or using unfair means will result in disqualification. No request for change of examination centre or date (CBT/Interview) will be entertained. SAIL-BSL reserves the right to reject any application, cancel the process, or engage fewer candidates than indicated, without assigning any reason. The decision of SAIL-BSL is final and binding. Any dispute arising from this advertisement is subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts/tribunals in the District of Bokaro, Jharkhand.e

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SAIL BSL Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The closing date for submitting online applications is 01-07-2026. The application window opens on 10-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the three levels of Young Professional engagement at SAIL Bokaro Steel Plant?
faq.answer: The three levels are Young Professional-1 (upper age 35 years, minimum 3 years post-qualification experience, retainership Rs. 70,000/month), Young Professional-2 (upper age 38 years, minimum 6 years experience, Rs. 1,00,000/month), and Young Professional-3 (upper age 42 years, minimum 10 years experience, Rs. 1,40,000/month).

faq.question: Q3. Is SAIL BSL Young Professional engagement a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No. This is a strictly fixed-term "Contract for Service" engagement for an initial period of up to 3 years, extendable by 2 more years at SAIL-BSL's sole discretion. It creates no right whatsoever to regularization against any permanent position in SAIL.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum educational qualification required for SAIL BSL Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: B.E./B.Tech (Regular/Full-time) in the relevant discipline from a Govt. recognised University/Institution with minimum 65% marks. For Finance Consultant (YP-1), CA/CS/CMA qualification is required. Distance/Correspondence/Off-campus qualifications are NOT eligible.

faq.question: Q5. Can a candidate apply for multiple roles or levels in SAIL BSL YP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. A candidate is permitted to apply for only one level and one domain/role. Applications for multiple levels or domains will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for SAIL BSL Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The registration fee (including processing fee) is Rs. 500/- for all candidates. This fee is non-refundable under any circumstances. Payment is through Bill Desk Payment Gateway (online mode only).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for SAIL BSL Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves: (1) Scrutiny and shortlisting based on eligibility; (2) CBT/Aptitude Test (only if eligible applications exceed 5 times the requirement, with minimum 50 percentile qualifying score); (3) Personal Interview (physical or virtual mode); Final merit list prepared with CBT:Interview weightage of 80:20.

faq.question: Q8. What benefits and perks are provided to SAIL BSL Young Professionals?
faq.answer: Benefits include monthly consolidated retainership fee (Rs. 70,000/Rs. 1,00,000/Rs. 1,40,000 by level), annual increment (4%/7%/10%), residential accommodation subject to availability, OPD & IPD medical facility at Company hospital for self and family, insurance premium reimbursement (up to Rs. 20,000–30,000/year by level), communication expense reimbursement, and official tour reimbursement. PF, pension, gratuity, PRP, and loans are not applicable.

faq.question: Q9. What documents must be uploaded while applying for SAIL BSL Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must upload: Matriculation Certificate (proof of DOB); Marks Sheet and Degree Certificate (B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech/CA/CS/CMA/MBA as applicable); Experience Certificates clearly mentioning job profile and area; Appointment Offer Letters/Promotion Orders/Release Orders and last Pay Slip from the employing company. All documents in PDF format of less than 300 KB each.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I check updates and corrigendum for SAIL BSL Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All updates, corrigendum, admit cards, CBT/interview schedules, and results will be published only on the SAIL Careers website (www.sailcareers.com). No individual communications will be sent. Candidates must visit the website regularly and ensure their email/mobile number remains active throughout the selection process.
